name: cashsplit
description: CashSplit — a Splitwise-style expense splitter with live sync

scripts.test:unit: vitest run tests/model.test.ts tests/venmo.test.ts tests/export.test.ts tests/ui
scripts.test:emulator: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,auth "vitest run --no-file-parallelism tests/rules.test.ts tests/db.test.ts tests/auth.test.ts tests/integration.test.ts"
scripts.test:run: vitest run tests/model.test.ts tests/venmo.test.ts tests/export.test.ts tests/ui && firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,auth "vitest run --no-file-parallelism tests/rules.test.ts tests/db.test.ts tests/auth.test.ts tests/integration.test.ts"
